name: Oxylabs
what_it_does: Offers enterprise proxy networks and a Web Scraper API with built-in JavaScript rendering, CAPTCHA solving, and structured data extraction for large-scale web data collection.
use_cases: Scrape search engine results pages (SERP) at scale with structured output using the dedicated SERP Scraper API
Extract product pricing and availability data from e-commerce sites using residential proxies to bypass bot detection
Collect real estate and job listing data via structured scraper APIs targeting major platforms
Route agent web requests through geo-targeted residential or datacenter proxies for location-specific data
Automate bulk data collection pipelines using async scraping jobs with webhook delivery
not_for: Interactive browser automation requiring multi-step stateful sessions
Screenshot or visual capture use cases without data extraction needs
Low-volume or occasional scraping where infrastructure overhead is not justified
best_when: You need enterprise-scale structured data extraction with built-in rendering, CAPTCHA handling, and reliable proxy rotation.
avoid_when: Your scraping volume is low or you need real-time interactive browser sessions rather than batch data collection.

auth.notes: Realtime Scraper uses HTTP Basic Auth (username:password) in the request; proxy access also uses username:password in proxy URL; API dashboard uses separate token.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial with limited API credits on signup
pricing.paid_tiers: Residential proxies from ~$8/GB; Scraper APIs from ~$49/month for 25,000 requests; SERP API pricing separate; enterprise negotiated
pricing.notes: Multiple product lines (proxy types, scraper APIs by vertical) each with separate pricing; enterprise contracts offer committed use discounts.

performance.rate_limits: Concurrency scales with plan tier; async jobs support higher throughput than synchronous requests

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Scraper API returns structured error codes; proxy-level errors surface as HTTP 407 or timeouts requiring agent-level interpretation.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All scraping operations are read-only; requests are safe to retry; async job IDs allow status polling without duplicate charges.
known_agent_gotchas: Product selection complexity is high: residential proxies, datacenter proxies, ISP proxies, and scraper APIs each require different integration patterns
Async scraping jobs use polling or webhooks; agents must implement job tracking to correlate results with original requests
CAPTCHA solving adds unpredictable latency; agents must use longer timeouts than for direct HTTP requests
Bandwidth metering on proxy products means inefficient agents (retrying unnecessarily, fetching unneeded pages) incur significant cost
Different scraper API verticals (SERP, e-commerce, real estate) return different schema structures; agents must handle per-vertical response parsing

security_score_components.security_notes: ISO27001 and SOC2 certified; proxy credentials embedded in URLs risk exposure in logs; ethical use and GDPR compliance enforced per terms of service.
